profile.name: Mahatav Arora
profile.role: Custom websites & online tools for businesses
profile.intro: I build websites and online tools that help your business look professional, get found on Google, and turn visitors into customers. I handle the whole thing, from our first chat to launch, and explain every step in plain English, no tech-speak required.
profile.availability: Taking on new website projects, from first chat to launch, no jargon.

featured.title: Channeling Skinny Bob
featured.summary: A bold, cinematic website that turns a creator's archive into an experience their fans can explore.
featured.description: I shaped the whole look and feel, built the entire website, and organized a large library of content, then added a few hidden surprises for fans to discover. Taken from a first idea all the way to launch.
highlights: Look and feel built from scratch

featured.title: TA Application System
featured.summary: A hiring tool that reads résumés automatically and helps the team find the right candidates fast.
featured.description: I built a system that scans applicants' résumés, pulls out their real skills, and lets the hiring team filter and sort candidates in seconds instead of hours, turning a slow, manual job into a few clicks.

featured.title: Green Construction
featured.summary: A full website rebuild for a university research centre, easy to update and easy to search.
featured.description: I redesigned and rebuilt the centre's website so their staff can publish research, events, and team updates themselves, without needing a developer. I also added a custom search and fixed their contact forms.
highlights: Staff can post their own updates

featured.title: AI Built From Scratch
featured.summary: I built my own version of the kind of AI that powers tools like ChatGPT, from the ground up.
featured.description: A from-scratch build of a language model, the technology behind today's AI chat tools. I wrote and tested every piece myself to truly understand how it works, so I can put AI to practical use in real projects.

featured.title: OKGN Boat Rentals
featured.summary: A faster, clearer boat-rental website with easy online booking, built for the busy season.
featured.description: I rebuilt the whole website and added a simple step-by-step booking system: pick a date and time, choose a boat, add your details, done. Built to handle the summer rush, get found locally, and keep spam out.

experiments.title: Self-Flying Drone That Follows People
experiments.summary: A drone that spots a person and flies itself to follow them, on its own, in real time.

experiments.title: Camera Robot That Chases a Target
experiments.summary: A little robot with a camera that locks onto a target and chases it around the room.

experiments.title: Drone That Lands Itself
experiments.summary: A drone that finds its own landing pad and touches down by itself, no pilot needed.

experiments.title: Banking Identity Checks
experiments.summary: Experiments in identity verification, spotting faces and confirming they're really there, the way banking apps do.

research.title: How AI Picks Up Bias
research.summary: Studied how AI takes on bias depending on what it's trained on, by training two models on very different philosophy texts and comparing how they 'think.'
research.paperTitle: Corpus-Conditioned Bias: Training GPT-2 Models on Eastern and Western Philosophical Texts

research.title: Spotting Human vs. AI Code
research.summary: Built a tool that can tell whether computer code was written by a person or by AI, and used it to study how students' work is changing.
research.paperTitle: Pre-Post AI Comparisons: Behavioural Changes in Student Capstone Projects

research.title: How Software Teams Work
research.summary: Built a tool that analyzes how software teams actually work together, turning their day-to-day activity into clear, visual patterns.

research.title: Reading Jersey Numbers on TV
research.summary: Built a system that reads players' jersey numbers from broadcast soccer footage, even when the video is blurry or far away.
research.paperTitle: Jersey Number Recognition in Broadcast Soccer Video

packages.intro: Simple, clear options based on what your business actually needs. Every website is built to be found on Google and ready to grow with you. I'll give you a price after a quick, no-pressure chat about your project.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.blurb: A clean, tidy site built on a website builder you can choose, Squarespace, WordPress, Wix, or similar. No custom design, just a fast and professional way to get your business online.
features: Set up on any website builder
Looks great on phones and tablets
Set up to show on Google

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.blurb: A one-of-a-kind website designed around your brand and built to turn visitors into customers. No templates, made just for you.
features: A custom design, made just for you
Easy to update yourself, no code
Built to load fast and rank on Google
See how visitors find and use your site

tiers.name: Performance
tiers.blurb: Eye-catching custom visuals, animation, and interactive features, plus smart tools and automation when your business needs them. For brands that want to truly stand out.
features: Custom tools built around your business

seo.label: GETTING FOUND ON GOOGLE
seo.summary: Showing up on Google is built into everything I make, and I can also improve it on its own, whether I built your site or not.
items: Find and fix what's hurting your ranking
Help you stand out in Google results
Show up in local searches and maps
Clear reports on how you're doing

faq.question: What kind of work do you take on?
faq.answer: Websites and online tools for businesses, from a simple, polished site to a custom build with online booking, customer logins, or smart automation. If it lives online, I can build it.

faq.question: Do I need to understand the tech?
faq.answer: Not at all, that's my job. I handle the technical side and explain things in plain English, so you can focus on running your business.

faq.question: Where are you based, and do you work remotely?
faq.answer: I'm based in Kelowna, BC, and I work with clients anywhere. Everything can be done remotely, on your schedule.

faq.question: Are you available for new work?
faq.answer: Yes, I'm taking on new projects, and I'm reliable about timelines and keeping you in the loop. The contact form below is the fastest way to start.
